label: Logo
description: Clean logo concept generation for brand marks, badges, and monograms.

required.name: brandName
required.description: Brand or product name shown by the logo

required.name: brandIdea
required.description: Core concept the logo should communicate

optional.name: letterHint
optional.description: Initials or monogram letters if desired

prompt.promptTemplate: Create a modern logo concept for {{brandName}}.

fragments.subject: a logo that communicates {{brandIdea}} for the {{industry}} space, using {{symbolIdea}} and {{letterHint}} where appropriate
fragments.style: flat logo concept, {{brandTone}}, geometric, highly simplified, suitable for professional branding
fragments.composition: single centered logo presentation, isolated mark, clear silhouette, no mockup scene
fragments.lighting: flat graphic treatment with no photoreal lighting
constraints: must feel like a clean brand mark
works in one color and full color

notes: Best for fast concept exploration. Final production logos should still be redrawn in vector software.
